title: Effect of divisible obligation between single obligor and obligee
doc_html:
Art. 1816.  Effect of divisible obligation between single obligor and obligee

When there is only one obligor and only one obligee, a divisible obligation must be performed as if it were indivisible.

Acts 1984, No. 331, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1985.
